reviews.comment:
entre mal por que me quede sin nafta, pero habia 2 surtidores vacios, me dejaron ahi un rato hasta que me avisaron que tenia que entrar por santiago y no santa fe (y medio de mala gana el aviso,ya que me habian visto hacia un rato), super lenta para ser tan grande, y parecia un poco distraido el personal por las promotoras del ACA

(Translated by Google)
I entered badly because I ran out of gas, but there were 2 empty pumps, they left me there for a while until they told me that I had to enter through Santiago and not Santa Fe (and I was half reluctant to tell them, since they had seen me a while ago), super slow for such a big city, and the staff seemed a little distracted by the ACA promoters
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURoakxxc29BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Fui a renovar el registro y el trámite lo hice en 15', aunque en 2 partes, porque tuve que volver al día siguiente por el CENAT, del que nadie te informa que podés hacerlo vos mismo 48hs antes del turno para tenerlo pago y no tener que volver. No es culpa del ACA, claro está, sólo advierto a quienes lo vayan a hacer para que no los hagan volver al otro día.

(Translated by Google)
I went to renew my registration and the process took 15 minutes, although it was in two parts, because I had to return the next day to the CENAT (National Driver's License Center). No one tells you that you can do it yourself 48 hours before your appointment to have it paid for and avoid having to come back. It's not the ACA's (Automobile Club of Argentina) fault, of course; I'm just warning those who are going to do it so they don't get made to come back the next day.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURodE5lX013EAE

reviews.comment:
Sobre brown y Santa Fe, 20
Minutos esperando por que no vino el supervisor y los dos playeros de charla con un amigo…. Un desastre!!!! ( domingo 26/02/23 a las 21:30 hs )

(Translated by Google)
At Brown and Santa Fe, 20 minutes waiting because the supervisor didn't come and the two attendants were chatting with a friend…. A disaster!!!! (Sunday 26/02/23 at 9:30 pm)
